However, I'm not aware of him being an NFL executive. A more likely candidate is Paul DePodesta, who was hired by the Dodgers in 2004 as the team's general manager. After his tenure with the Dodgers, DePodesta went on to work in the NFL as an executive with the Cleveland Browns. </think>
<answer> Paul DePodesta </answer>
